forward_validation_gap.note: Historical replay cannot upgrade alpha or confidence until forward validation samples mature.

guardrails: Historical replay is research evaluation only and cannot replace daily forward validation.
Historical replay results must not be described as confirmed alpha.
Forecast Accuracy Ledger remains immutable; this benchmark does not rewrite forecast_records.csv.
No buy/sell, entry/exit, PnL, paper trading, or execution recommendation is produced.
Alpha v1 threshold remains frozen at 0.32534311.
